product.description:
Nivea Men Dry Impact Stick:
• Experience extra gentle protection accompanied by an extra fresh and extra clean skin feel
• Reliable 48h anti-perspirant protection powered by a dual active formula with 2 anti-perspirant actives.
• New patented emulsion technology provides a softer texture and a smoother application
• New, modern packaging with 25% more content* and a more intuitive user experience
• 98% recyclable packaging & 100% climate neutralized product**

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Ppg-14 Butyl Ether, Cetyl Palmitate, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Propylene Glycol, Palmitic Acid, Stearic Acid, Parfum, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, C20-40 Alkyl Stearate, Oleth-20, Octyldodecanol, Persea Gratissima Oil, Steareth-2, Steareth-21, Myristic Acid, Arachidic Acid, Oleic Acid, Oryzanol, Bht
metaData.Key Information:
With its new patented emulsion technology, Nivea Men Dry Impact Anti-Perspirant Stick offers 72h reliable protection and a smooth application.
Experience an extra fresh and non-sticky skin feel.

The dual protect formula contains two anti-perspirant actives for a strong sweat protection. The dermatologically proven and ethyl alcohol-free formula is gentle to your skin.

Discover the new and modern packaging which was designed for a more intuitive user experience. It offers 25% more content and saves 30% plastic (*per ml compared to the previous NIVEA Deo stick packaging). The Nivea Men Dry Impact Anti-Perspirant stick is a 100% climate neutralized product.

**Remaining CO2 emissions are balanced out through certified climate projects. More on Nivea.com/climate
metaData.SAP Product Name: NIVEA MEN DRY IMPACT ANTI-PERSPIRANT STICK 50ML
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place

product.name: Nivea Men Anti-Perspirant Stick - Dry Impact

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

metaData.Ingredients: Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclomethicone, Aluminium Chlorohydrate, Isopropyl Palmite, Aluminium Sequichlorohydrate, Magnesium Aluminium Silicate, Disteardismonium Hectorite, Demethicone, Octyldodecanol, Propylene Carbonate, Dimenthiconol, Persea Gratissima Oil, Parfum
metaData.Key Information:
• 48 hours anti-perspirant protection and gentle Nivea care
• Effective regulation of perspiration with DryPlus system and minerals
• Dematologically tested
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Hold can 15cm from the underarm and spray
2. Allow the products to dry completely
3. Shake well before use
• Caution:
Do not apply on irritated or damaged skin
metaData.SAP Product Name: NIVEA DEODORANT SPRAY - FRESH DRY
metaData.Storage Information:
• Directions:
1. Keep away from children
2. Protect from sunlight
3. Keep away from from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources
• Danger:
1. Extremely flammable
2. Pressurised container may burst if heated
3. Give only empty bottle to recycling processes
4. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C
5. Do not pierce or burn, even after use
6. Do not spray into eyes
